## Status and safety

- [ ] This PR does not imply production mainnet certification.
- [ ] `docs/status.md` remains accurate.
- [ ] `SECURITY.md` was updated if the risk posture changed.
- [ ] Audit manifests were not changed to `mainnetAllowed: true` without external signed audit evidence.

## Tests / checks

- [ ] I ran relevant tests.
- [ ] I ran conformance checks if protocol objects, schemas, or rails changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run release:check` if docs, examples, package metadata, release scripts, or workflows changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run audit:check` if security posture, manifests, rails, or audit docs changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run site:check` if public docs or site assets changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm run release:preflight -- --allow-branch --pack` if release, packaging, workspace, or publish workflow behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated examples or docs if public behavior changed.
